case_title: SAN FRANCISCO ZEN CENTER vs. HODGSON, JEAN et al

docket_entries.description: JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT HODGSON, JEAN
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT HODGSON, JEAN

DEPT. 3, JUDGE J.ORR, CSR C.MANDIA, CLERK, E.MONTI 10:00 AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, ARLEEN HELFRICH. DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, ANDREW DHUEY. FOURTEEN JURORS ARE SEATED IN THE JURY BOX. JUDGE ANNOUNCES CASE AND BEGINS VOIR DIRE. 2:30PM DEFENSE MOTION IN LIMINE TO DISMISS ACTION DENIED. 4:45PM COURT ADJOURNED TO 9AM, 12-10-93.
PER DIEM FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO ZEN CENTER

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION 2C08P1110000 (JURY FEES), PAYABLE TO CLERK OF MUNICIPAL COURT, WARRANT #00014545, DATED DEC-10-1993

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HODGSON, JEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 340 PAGE ST, #203, SF. $649.00 RENT, $743.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,392.50, STAYED UNTIL JAN-04-1994, LEASE FORFEITED

9:30 AM C/C FOR CONTINUED JURY TRIAL. ALL JURORS AND BOTH COUNSEL PRESENT. 10:45 AM DEFENSE RESTS. COURT RECESS. SAME ADMONISHMENT. 11:20 AM PLTF COUNSEL GIVES CLOSING ARGUMENT. 11:30 AM DEFENSE COUNSEL GIVES CLOSING ARGUMENT. 11:45 AM PLTF GIVES FINAL, FINAL CLOSING ARGUMENT. 1:45 PM COURT RECONVENES. ALL JURORS & COUNSEL PRESENT. COURT READS JURY INSTRUCTION TO JURY. BOTH COUNSEL STIPULATE TO EXCUSE ALTERNATE JUROR. BAILIFF SWORN & JURORS RETIRE TO DELIBERATE. JURY INSTRUCTIONS, ADMITTED EVIDENCE & VERDICT FORMS DELIVERED TO JURY ROOM. 2:55 PM COURT RECONVENES. ALL PRESENT. JURY VERDICTS ARE READ INTO THE RECORD AND JURY POLLED. 3:15 PM PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. STAYED OF EXECUTION IS GRANTED TO 1-5-94, BACK RENTS DUE. ALL ADMITTED EVIDENCE IS RETAINED. ALL OTHER EXHIBITS ARE WITHDRAWN.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO ZEN CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT HODGSON, JEAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

REMITTITUR FILED ORDER DENYING PETITION FOR REHEARING AFTER JUDGMENT AND REQUEST FOR CERTIFICATION. DECISION: IT IS THEREFORE ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT OF THE TRIAL COURT IS AFFIRMED IN PART AND REVERSED IN PART.
